translation.en: I am afraid when I see the dark.

notes_md:
**sợ hãi** = afraid, scared. It describes a strong feeling of fear.

It’s usually used as an adjective after a subject: *ai đó sợ hãi*. You can also use it as a noun for “fear” in a more abstract way.


Stronger and more intense than just **sợ**. Related words: **lo lắng** (anxious, more about worry), opposite: **can đảm** (brave).
notes:
sợ hãi = afraid, scared. It describes a strong feeling of fear.

It’s usually used as an adjective after a subject: ai đó sợ hãi. You can also use it as a noun for “fear” in a more abstract way.

Stronger and more intense than just sợ. Related words: lo lắng (anxious, more about worry), opposite: can đảm (brave).
exampleSentences: Em cảm thấy sợ hãi khi xem phim kinh dị vào ban đêm.
Anh ấy sợ hãi khi phải nói trước đám đông lớn.
Chị không nên để bản thân bị sợ hãi bởi những điều nhỏ nhặt.

translation.en: I am afraid when I see the dark.

exampleSentencesTranslated: I feel afraid when watching horror movies at night.
He is afraid when he has to speak in front of a large crowd.
You should not let yourself be afraid of small things.

definitions.vi: Cảm giác sợ hãi hoặc lo âu.
definitions.es: Una sensación de miedo o ansiedad.
definitions.en: A feeling of fear or anxiety.

example.es: Me siento asustado al ver películas de terror.
example.vi: Tôi cảm thấy sợ hãi khi xem phim kinh dị.
example.en: I feel scared when watching horror movies.
